assertion_results.text: Step 7 executes the concurrent triage check for upstream component quinn-proto

assertion_results.text: No concurrent triages are detected — the JQL search returns zero results
assertion_results.evidence: concurrent-triage.md line 27: 'The JQL search returned **zero results**.' Line 29: 'No other engineer is actively triaging a different CVE that affects the quinn-proto upstream component.'

No concurrent triage warning is needed'. triage-outcome.md line 59: 'No concurrent triages detected. Proceed to Case A/B/C branching.' The triage outcome then moves directly to Case A/B determination at lines 63-69 with no warning interposed.
